name: Almond Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture.
3. Slowly add the flour, baking soda, almond extract, and corn syrup (or molasses, honey) to the mixture and mix until smooth.
4. Take a small piece of the dough and roll it into a ball.
5. Continue rolling out the dough until all has been used.
6. Flatten each ball into a thick cookie and place an almond on top of each, pressing it in slightly.
7. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 375°F (190°C) for about 20 minutes.
This recipe makes about four dozen cookies. The cookies can be wrapped in foil and frozen if desired. Enjoy!
